_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting exploratory data analysis, including distributional analysis, correlation analysis, anomaly detection, and translating EDA findings into modeling decisions.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-003 (AB, cosine: 0.414), AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.408).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.597). Shared vocabulary: [analysis, conducting, skill]. DCWF-only terms [trend] vs WIDAI-only terms [anomaly, correlation, data, decisions, detection, distributional] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.909 (P=0.956, R=0.867). P exceeds R by 0.089 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in conducting trend analysis." and "Skill in conducting exploratory data analysis, including distributional analysis" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.490 < STS 0.597 (gap -0.107). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [trend] and [anomaly, correlation, data] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 21.1%. Shared tokens: [analysis, conducting, skill]. DCWF-only: [trend]. WIDAI-only: [anomaly, correlation, data, decisions, detection, distributional].
